theme: One city. One wall. A thousand Moze · each a continuous scene made of traits that speak in sequence.

BACKGROUND.Army Canvas: On army-green canvas, the wall still smells like wet paint and late nights.
BACKGROUND.Ash Grey: Under ash-grey sky, the block holds its breath.
BACKGROUND.Blue: Blue hour hits the alley first. soft light, hard edges.
BACKGROUND.Blue Light: Blue light pools on brick; something is about to move.
BACKGROUND.Blushing Magenta: Magenta blush floods the street like a secret too loud to keep.
BACKGROUND.Bright Grey Canvas: Bright grey canvas waits. empty stage, full intent.
BACKGROUND.Castile Canvas: Castile canvas stretches wide, ready for a name.
BACKGROUND.Concrete: Concrete underfoot; the city writes back in scuffs.
BACKGROUND.Cream Canvas: Cream canvas softens the night, but not the story.
BACKGROUND.Cream Puff: Cream-puff haze makes the block look almost gentle.
BACKGROUND.Delusion Canvas: Delusion canvas: reality optional, style mandatory.
BACKGROUND.Denim Canvas: Denim canvas. street fabric stretched into sky.
BACKGROUND.Exotic Moth: Exotic moth light flickers; trouble has pretty wings.
BACKGROUND.Flaming Red: Flaming red fills the frame. heat before the punchline.
BACKGROUND.Grandpa Home Canvas: Grandpa-home canvas: old walls, new tags.
BACKGROUND.Green: Green glow on the corner, half park, half warning.
BACKGROUND.Green Canvas: Green canvas breathes like a wall that still remembers rain.
BACKGROUND.Grey: Grey day, grey wall. perfect mute for loud characters.
BACKGROUND.Grey Canvas: Grey canvas keeps the palette honest.
BACKGROUND.Incident Canvas: Incident canvas: whatever happened here left a mark.
BACKGROUND.Jeans Canvas: Jeans-wash canvas, soft fade, hard attitude.
BACKGROUND.Land Canvas: Land canvas opens flat. nowhere to hide a story.
BACKGROUND.Lavender Canvas: Lavender canvas turns the street into a soft crime scene.
BACKGROUND.Lavender Haze: Lavender haze drifts; outlines blur, intent doesn't.
BACKGROUND.Matcha Canvas: Matcha green canvas. calm color, restless hands.
BACKGROUND.Mickey Doll Canvas: Mickey-doll canvas winks: pop culture as camouflage.
BACKGROUND.Moss: Moss creeps the edges; the city grows over old names.
BACKGROUND.Mystic Mauve: Mystic mauve settles like fog with a personality.
BACKGROUND.Neon: Neon splits the dark. the wall finally has a pulse.
BACKGROUND.Ocean Canvas: Ocean canvas rolls cool blue under hot graffiti.
BACKGROUND.Olive Jar: Olive-jar green, pickled night, sharp aftertaste.
BACKGROUND.Orange Canvas: Orange canvas burns low, dusk hanging on.
BACKGROUND.Orange Peel: Orange-peel light peels the hour open.
BACKGROUND.Park Canvas: Park canvas: trees as witnesses, benches as alibis.
BACKGROUND.Peppermint: Peppermint air, clean sting after a long run.
BACKGROUND.Pink: Pink flood. sweet color, sour streets.
BACKGROUND.Playground Canvas: Playground canvas: games got serious years ago.
BACKGROUND.Police Canvas: Police-blue canvas watches; the crew still paints.
BACKGROUND.Purple: Purple depth, royal for a second, then back to the block.
BACKGROUND.Red: Red saturates everything. stop sign energy.
BACKGROUND.Red Canvas: Red canvas shouts before anyone speaks.
BACKGROUND.Rose: Rose tint softens the bruise, not the story.
BACKGROUND.Salmon Canvas: Salmon canvas glows like late-shop neon.
BACKGROUND.Soba: Soba-warm backdrop, quiet steam, loud characters.
BACKGROUND.Sprout: Sprout green: something new pushing through concrete.
BACKGROUND.Station Canvas: Station canvas. arrivals, exits, and unfinished tags.
BACKGROUND.Strawberry Milkshake: Strawberry milkshake light, too sweet for this hour.
BACKGROUND.Sunkist Canvas: Sunkist canvas pours citrus heat on the wall.
BACKGROUND.Sunset Canvas: Sunset canvas holds the last clean gold of day.
BACKGROUND.Tan: Tan ground, dust and sun, no place to fade into.
BACKGROUND.Tan Canvas: Tan canvas keeps the scene dry and sharp.
BACKGROUND.Tosca Canvas: Tosca blue-green, cool water under hot spray.
BACKGROUND.Vandal Canvas: Vandal canvas admits it: this wall was never neutral.
BACKGROUND.Violet Canvas: Violet canvas deepens; night puts its hood up.
BACKGROUND.Washed Denim: Washed denim sky. faded, but still standing.
BACKGROUND.White Canvas: White canvas dares the first line.
BACKGROUND.Winter Season Canvas: Winter-season canvas, breath-fog and cold fingers.
BACKGROUND.Yellow: Yellow hits hard. caution tape without the tape.
BACKGROUND.Yellow Canvas: Yellow canvas wakes the block early.

BASE.Moze: This is Moze. one of a thousand street spirits given a body.

SKIN.Blank: No extra mark on the skin. clean base, dirty world.
SKIN.Doll: Doll-smooth skin: toy-cute until you meet the eyes.
SKIN.Fire: Fire rides the skin; heat that never fully cools.
SKIN.Hellheim Mark: Hellheim marks crawl the face. old pact, new canvas.
SKIN.Ifrit Jambe: Ifrit jambe burns low along the jaw, spirit-fire under paint.
SKIN.Justin Bieber Flame: Celebrity flame licks the cheek. fame as a special effect.
SKIN.Leopard: Leopard print breaks the silhouette; wild pattern in a city cage.
SKIN.Thunder: Thunder cracks across the skin. storm held in a body.

CLOTHES.Baseball Green Jacket: A green baseball jacket zips the story mid-game.
CLOTHES.Baseball Suit: Full baseball suit: uniform for a team that never clocks out.
CLOTHES.Blank: No clothes layer. bare attitude only.
CLOTHES.Blue Hoodie: Blue hoodie up; identity optional, comfort mandatory.
CLOTHES.Boxer Glove: Boxer gloves still on. round not over.
CLOTHES.Casual Blue Bear: Casual blue bear fit: soft merch, hard stare.
CLOTHES.Designer Suit: Designer suit on the street: stolen elegance or earned flex.
CLOTHES.Dragon Custom: Dragon custom wraps the torso in myth that moves.
CLOTHES.Evil Mage Custom: Evil-mage custom: spellbook stitched into the seams.
CLOTHES.Graffiti Suit: Graffiti suit. wearing the wall you just painted.
CLOTHES.Gray Sweater: Gray sweater, low profile, high intention.
CLOTHES.Green Hoodie: Green hoodie blends into the night foliage of the city.
CLOTHES.Hawaii Suit: Hawaii suit refuses the weather report.
CLOTHES.Jail Punisher Suit: Jail-punisher suit: stripes with a verdict already written.
CLOTHES.Mickey Bottom: Mickey-bottom fit. cartoon legs, serious business up top.
CLOTHES.Nudist: Bare to the world; nothing left to misread.
CLOTHES.Pharaoh Mummy Custom: Pharaoh-mummy wrap: ancient drip, modern block.
CLOTHES.Punk Jacket: Punk jacket stacked with pins of every war survived.
CLOTHES.Robot Custom: Robot custom: chrome panels over a soft core.
CLOTHES.Soldier Suit AK4&: Soldier suit ready. AK attitude without the paperwork.
CLOTHES.Sphinx Necklace Final Boss: Sphinx necklace: final-boss jewelry that asks riddles.
CLOTHES.Suit Up: Suit up. boardroom cut for alley negotiations.
CLOTHES.Swim Suit: Swim suit in the wrong climate, correct energy.
CLOTHES.Thor Custom: Thor custom: thunder god cosplay that somehow works.
CLOTHES.Tie: Just a tie. formal enough to lie, casual enough to run.
CLOTHES.White TShirt: White tee, blank slate for the next stain of legend.
CLOTHES.X-Rays Body: X-ray body on show. bones as fashion, secrets as silhouette.

EYES.Amazed Eyes: Amazed eyes catch every tag like it's the first.
EYES.Anime Eyes: Anime eyes blow the scene open. big feelings, bigger frame.
EYES.Aura Glasses: Aura glasses filter the street into pure signal.
EYES.Beaten Eyes: Beaten eyes still track the wall; tired, not done.
EYES.Blink Eyes: Blink eyes half-closed. saw too much, still watching.
EYES.Cruel Eyes: Cruel eyes cut the caption short.
EYES.Dollar Eyes: Dollar eyes price the block in real time.
EYES.Double Eyes: Double eyes: one for art, one for escape routes.
EYES.Happy Eyes: Happy eyes make the danger look accidental.
EYES.Hunter Eyes: Hunter eyes lock a target on the next empty wall.
EYES.Laser Eyes: Laser eyes burn a line through the dark. aim true, paint later.
EYES.Looking At Eyes: Looking-at eyes pin you in the frame with them.
EYES.Love Eyes: Love eyes softens the whole crime scene.
EYES.Mummy Eyes: Mummy eyes stare from centuries of wrap and dust.
EYES.Pink Sparkly Eyes: Pink sparkly eyes glitter over grit.
EYES.Rockstar Eyes: Rockstar eyes own the sidewalk stage.
EYES.Spirally Googles: Spirally goggles spin the world into a trip.
EYES.Superstar Eyes: Superstar eyes throw a pink star into the shot. always in front of the noise.
EYES.Thinking Eyes: Thinking eyes rewrite the plan mid-stroll.
EYES.X Eyes: X eyes: KO'd look, still standing.

HEAD.Absolute King Crown: An absolute-king crown sits crooked, power without etiquette.
HEAD.Blank#10: Head bare of extras. face does the work.
HEAD.Blue Pink Hair: Blue-pink hair splits the palette in half.
HEAD.Blue Punk Hair: Blue punk hair spikes the attitude higher.
HEAD.Bubble Hat: Bubble hat bounces with every bad decision.
HEAD.Checkerboard Ear: Checkerboard ear detail: game piece on a living board.
HEAD.Doctor Monkey Head: Doctor-monkey head replaces the mask with a whole other face.
HEAD.Doctor Monkey Head Grafitti: Graffiti doctor-monkey head: science, spray, and chaos.
HEAD.Duck Hat: Duck hat nods to a famous bird. street parody with love.
HEAD.Ear Socks: Ear socks: soft armor for loud nights.
HEAD.Gold Earring: Gold earring catches neon like a tiny trophy.
HEAD.Graffiti Tattoo#1: Graffiti tattoo on the head: art that doesn't wash off.
HEAD.Green Ears: Green ears perk. the crew signal still lives.
HEAD.Green Hat Flower: Green hat with a flower: soft crown for hard blocks.
HEAD.Hellblaze Ears: Hellblaze ears burn at the tips.
HEAD.Mcd Worker Cap: Fast-food cap irony on a mythic face.
HEAD.Mohawk Hair: Mohawk splits the wind and the conversation.
HEAD.Mummy Hat: Mummy hat wraps the last free thoughts.
HEAD.Nihilsm: Nihilism mark on the head. nothing matters, drip does.
HEAD.Ninja Hair: Ninja hair points forward like a leaf-village rumor on the run.
HEAD.Party Hat: Party hat for a funeral of boring taste.
HEAD.Pink Blossom Hair: Pink blossom hair blooms in the wrong season.
HEAD.Red Hair Hat: Red hair-hat hybrid: can't decide, so both.
HEAD.Rubber Bracelet Hat: Rubber bracelet hat stacks scenes like wrist history.
HEAD.Skull Checkerboard: Skull checkerboard: death as a cute pattern.
HEAD.VR Glasses: VR glasses load another city on top of this one.
HEAD.Yellow Fluffy Hat: Yellow fluffy hat: softness as a power move.

MOUTH.Bandana Mouth Punk: Bandana over the mouth: talk less, mean more.
MOUTH.Cigar Mouth: Cigar smoke writes the epilogue in grey.
MOUTH.Close Teeth: Teeth closed tight; the sentence stays inside.
MOUTH.Clown Mouth: Clown mouth laughs the tension off the wall.
MOUTH.Dragon Breath: Dragon breath curls from the lips. story ends in heat.
MOUTH.Eat Pizza: Pizza in mouth: victory snack mid-legend.
MOUTH.Fresh Lips: Fresh lips, clean line, last word unspoken.
MOUTH.Gold Teeth: Gold teeth flash the only honest currency.
MOUTH.Happy Mouth: Happy mouth sells the whole scene as a good time.
MOUTH.Metal Long Tongue: Metal long tongue. the wall finally talks back.
MOUTH.Monsieur Cigs: Pipe and 'stache: old-money calm in new-money chaos.
MOUTH.Ninja Mask: Ninja mask seals the lower face; mission first.
MOUTH.Nyan Mouth: Nyan mouth drops a cartoon note into the grit.
MOUTH.Plaster Mouth Close: Plaster seals the mouth. silence is part of the piece.
MOUTH.Sad Mouth: Sad mouth lowers the volume without killing the beat.
MOUTH.Simple Smile Mouth: Simple smile: the quietest threat in the set.
